body:
Hey Amara — just wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week and confirm a few details before we circulate the deck more broadly. As discussed, we're targeting a $4M seed round and I'd love to have [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) anchor at roughly 18% of the cap table coming out of this raise. The product is humming — we processed over 2 million carbon credit verifications through [CarbonLedger](orgs/carbonledger) in Q2 alone, which I think really validates the infrastructure thesis you've been excited about. I know you mentioned wanting to see one more month of retention data before moving to term sheet, so I'll have our June cohort numbers over to you by end of week. Let me know if the 18% figure works on your end or if we need to revisit given how the round is shaping up.

Chloe
